channels.title: Fedlex — Swiss Federal Law Portal (Official Compilation AS/RO + Classified Compilation SR/RS)
channels.publisher: Swiss Federal Chancellery (Schweizerische Bundeskanzlei / Chancellerie fédérale suisse)

channels.title: Swiss Press Council / Schweizer Presserat · Conseil suisse de la presse · Consiglio svizzero della stampa
channels.publisher: Swiss Press Council Foundation (Stiftung Schweizer Presserat / Fondation Conseil suisse de la presse)
channels.notes: The Swiss Press Council is the country's recognized self-regulatory media-ethics body. It maintains the «Declaration of the Duties and Rights of Journalists» (the Journalists' Code) and handles, free of charge, complaints about journalistic conduct; it also acts on its own initiative to defend press freedom. Composed of 21 members across three language-region chambers. Its rulings are non-binding (no state enforcement).
